CREATE TABLE punycode_test (id Int32, original_string String);
SELECT id, original_string, tryPunycodeDecode(original_string) AS decoded_string FROM punycode_test;
CREATE TABLE more_complex (id Int32, domain String, user String);

SELECT m.id, m.domain, tryPunycodeDecode(m.domain) AS decoded_domain, m.user FROM more_complex m WHERE m.domain NOT IN (SELECT p.original_string FROM punycode_test p WHERE tryPunycodeDecode(p.original_string) != '');
WITH (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM punycode_test) AS total_count, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM punycode_test WHERE tryPunycodeDecode(original_string) = '') AS invalid_count SELECT total_count, invalid_count;
SELECT id, original_string, tryPunycodeDecode(original_string) AS decoded_string FROM punycode_test WHERE original_string LIKE 'xn--%';
CREATE TABLE combined_test AS SELECT id, original_string, tryPunycodeDecode(original_string) AS decoded_string FROM punycode_test WHERE original_string != 'invalid_string_#%!';
SELECT *, if(decoded_string != '', 'Valid', 'Invalid') AS validity FROM combined_test;
